WDS.note: Woodside is the purest large-cap play on Brent crude's 27% rally since July 1. Morgan Stanley's Buy upgrade on Santos validates the sector thesis. Scarborough L
WDS.name: Woodside Energy Group
WDS.narrative: Woodside is the purest large-cap play on Brent crude's 27% rally since July 1. Morgan Stanley's Buy upgrade on Santos validates the sector thesis. Scarborough LNG first cargo targeted Q4 2026 — a major production milestone. Energy sector +10% vs materials -14% since July 1.

EOS.name: Electro Optic Systems Holdings
EOS.narrative: EOS is the standout discovery of this run. +7.74% today on 3.66M shares while the market is only +0.34%. The analyst consensus of A$11.12 from 4 analysts all rated Strong Buy implies 44% upside. EOS makes optronics and remote weapon systems — direct beneficiaries of AUKUS, Hormuz escalation, and global defence budget expansion.

ILU.note: Iluka signed a take-or-pay offtake agreement for rare earth oxides commencing 2028, locking in US$155 million in minimum revenue over 4 years. This transforms I
ILU.name: Iluka Resources
ILU.narrative: Iluka signed a take-or-pay offtake agreement for rare earth oxides commencing 2028, locking in US$155 million in minimum revenue over 4 years. This transforms ILU's risk profile — guaranteed revenue underpins the thesis. The Australia-India critical minerals framework (July 2026) adds structural tailwinds.

COIN.note: Coinbase moved +4.59% while BTC holds at $59,971 (+1.23%) — stable floor. COIN is the cleanest US-listed crypto exposure play without the direct leverage of MST
COIN.name: Coinbase Global
COIN.narrative: Coinbase moved +4.59% while BTC holds at $59,971 (+1.23%) — stable floor. COIN is the cleanest US-listed crypto exposure play without the direct leverage of MSTR (down 3.54%) or operational risk of miners like RIOT (down 7.72%). US market reopens today — watch for continuation.

PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies
PLTR.narrative: Palantir pulled back -2.34% to $116.70 — a pullback entry opportunity from the $129.70 recent high (10% cheaper). PLTR AI Platform (AIP) is the leading AI operating system for defence and government intelligence. AUKUS and NATO 5% GDP spending continue to build.

NVDA.name: Nvidia Corporation
NVDA.narrative: Nvidia is the clearest long-term AI infrastructure play. MSFT, META, Google and Amazon all confirmed sustained AI capex in July 13 earnings. Deutsche Bank raised its target to $220. NVDA Q2 earnings due August 26. Current $207.29 is 14% below the 52-week high of $236.54.
